# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User's code style preference: Single-statement blocks have the opening brace on a new line, with the statement and closing brace inline on the same line. Example: `if (condition)\n{ return; }` or `catch (Exception)\n{ return; }`. Multi-statement blocks keep braces on separate lines.
- User is actively optimizing navigation thresholds and parameters in their .NET MAUI navigation app. They are working on a branch called "dev-thresholds" and are interested in making speed-dependent parameters adaptive rather than hardcoded.
